title: Razorpay UPI Response Config
description: Runtime handler configuration returned in the checkout response for com.razorpay.upi. After the platform submits Complete Checkout with a upi_intent instrument (no credential), the business creates a Razorpay payment order and returns the intent_uri credential in the escalation response. This config provides only what the platform needs for display before escalation.

environment.description: Razorpay API environment for this checkout.

merchant_name.description: Business display name shown to the buyer during UPI payment.
